title: AI for Video & Images
subtitle: Sora 2, Midjourney v7, Seedance, Flux 2 — what's actually good for visual content in 2026.

sections.heading: The Visual AI Landscape
sections.content: Image and video generation evolved fast. Here's where things stand in 2026.

sections.heading: Image Generation
sections.content: Midjourney v7, DALL-E 3, Flux 2, Stable Diffusion — each has strengths. Midjourney for aesthetics, DALL-E for accuracy.

sections.heading: Video Generation
sections.content: Sora 2, Seedance, Runway Gen-3 — video is getting real. Still limited, but usable for short clips.

sections.heading: What to Actually Use
sections.content: For marketing: Midjourney. For content: DALL-E. For video: start with Sora 2. For free: Flux.

sections.heading: Ethics and Copyright
sections.content: The legal landscape is evolving. Be aware of training data concerns. Don't pass AI art off as human-made.

key_takeaways: Midjourney for aesthetics, DALL-E for accuracy, Sora 2 for video, Flux for free
Video generation is usable for short clips but still limited in 2026
Be transparent about AI-generated content and aware of evolving copyright law
